title: Ceramic Blue Tile
description:
Premium ceramic tile with elegant blue glaze finish.
Perfect for modern kitchens and bathroom walls.
Highly durable surface resistant to stains and moisture.

title: Marble White Tile
description:
Luxurious white marble tile with natural veining.
Adds a premium and sophisticated look to interiors.
Ideal for living rooms, halls, and feature walls.

title: Granite Black Tile
description:
Strong granite tile with deep black polished finish.
Highly resistant to scratches and heavy usage.
Perfect for commercial and high-traffic areas.

title: Wood Finish Tile
description:
Natural wood-look tile with realistic grain texture.
Combines beauty of wood with durability of tiles.
Great for bedrooms and cozy interior spaces.

title: Glossy Cream Tile
description:
Smooth glossy tile with soft cream tone finish.
Reflects light beautifully to enhance room brightness.
Ideal for modern homes and office spaces.

title: Matte Grey Tile
description:
Elegant matte grey tile with minimalistic appeal.
Non-slip surface makes it safe for bathrooms.
Perfect for contemporary interior design themes.

title: Patterned Mosaic Tile
description:
Decorative mosaic tile with intricate patterns.
Adds artistic touch to walls and backsplashes.
Great choice for kitchens and accent areas.

title: Rustic Brown Tile
description:
Warm brown tile with rustic textured finish.
Brings a natural earthy vibe to any space.
Ideal for outdoor patios and traditional interiors.

title: Polished Beige Tile
description:
Classic beige tile with polished smooth surface.
Neutral tone complements all types of decor styles.
Suitable for both residential and commercial use.

title: Stone Texture Tile
description:
Natural stone-inspired tile with rugged texture.
Provides authentic outdoor and natural aesthetics.
Highly durable and weather-resistant material.

title: Glossy Black Tile
description:
Sleek black tile with high-gloss reflective finish.
Adds bold and luxurious touch to interiors.
Best for modern kitchens and feature walls.

title: Outdoor Anti-Slip Tile
description:
Special anti-slip tile designed for outdoor areas.
Provides maximum grip even in wet conditions.
Perfect for balconies, poolsides, and terraces.

title: Subway White Tile
description:
Classic subway tile with clean white finish.
Timeless design for kitchens and bathroom walls.
Easy to clean and maintain surface.

title: Luxury Gold Vein Tile
description:
Premium tile with elegant gold vein detailing.
Creates a high-end luxurious interior look.
Perfect for feature walls and upscale designs.

title: Industrial Cement Tile
description:
Raw cement-look tile with industrial style.
Perfect for loft-style and modern interiors.
Strong and durable surface for heavy usage.

title: Sky Blue Gloss Tile
description:
Soft sky blue tile with glossy finish.
Enhances brightness and airy feeling in rooms.
Ideal for bathrooms and relaxing spaces.

title: Hexagon Designer Tile
description:
Modern hexagon-shaped tile for unique layouts.
Adds geometric beauty to floors and walls.
Perfect for trendy and creative interiors.

title: Vintage Pattern Tile
description:
Classic vintage tile with artistic patterns.
Brings retro charm and character to spaces.
Ideal for cafes, kitchens, and feature areas.

title: Dark Slate Tile
description:
Natural slate tile with deep dark tones.
Provides a bold and earthy appearance.
Perfect for both indoor and outdoor use.

title: Ivory Smooth Tile
description:
Soft ivory tile with smooth elegant finish.
Creates a calm and sophisticated environment.
Suitable for bedrooms, halls, and offices.
